title: Marble Rocks and Tools Mod
description:
This mod adds marble and marble tools to your game.

This mod includes limestone, raw marble, marble, and marble tools, blocks are also included
body:
This mod adds marble and marble tools to the game.

At this time it is only for Minecraft Version 1.20.1 but soon will be updated to the latest version in the near future, this is currently a beta build and please let me know if there are any bugs. The rest of the items include limestone, raw marble, raw marble blocks, marble blocks, and of course plenty of tools. The tools are similar to iron tools but slighty weaker then regular iron tools.

This mod was made with MCreator.
